name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS Idle

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, state, messages
Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort, Idle \* Participant states
Decide, \* Coordinator state
\* Message types
PrepareMsg, VoteYesMsg, VoteNoMsg, CommitMsg, AbortMsg

\* Type definitions
TypeOK == /\ participants \in SUBSET [1..N]
          /\ coordinator \in participants
          /\ state \in [participants \cup {coordinator} -> {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort, Idle, Decide}]
          /\ messages \subseteq [participants \cup {coordinator} -> {PrepareMsg, VoteYesMsg, VoteNoMsg, CommitMsg, AbortMsg}]

\* Initial state
Init == /\ participants = {1, 2, ..., N}
        /\ coordinator \in participants
        /\ state = [i \in participants \cup {coordinator} |-> Idle]
        /\ messages = {}

\* Sending a message
SendMsg(msgType, from, to) == /\ from \in participants \cup {coordinator}
                               /\ to \in participants \cup {coordinator}
                               /\ msgType \in {PrepareMsg, VoteYesMsg, VoteNoMsg, CommitMsg, AbortMsg}
                               /\ messages' = messages \cup {msgType}
                               /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state>>

\* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants
CoordinatorPrepare == /\ state[coordinator] = Idle
                      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = Decide]
                      /\ messages' = messages \cup {PrepareMsg}
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state>>

\* Participant receives Prepare and votes
ParticipantVoteYes == /\ state[coordinator] = Decide
                      /\ state[participant] = Idle
                      /\ messages' = messages \cup {VoteYesMsg}
                      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![participant] = VoteYes]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state>>

ParticipantVoteNo == /\ state[coordinator] = Decide
                     /\ state[participant] = Idle
                     /\ messages' = messages \cup {VoteNoMsg}
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![participant] = VoteNo]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state>>

\* Coordinator receives all votes and decides
CoordinatorDecideCommit == /\ state[coordinator] = Decide
                           /\ \A p \in participants : state[p] = VoteYes
                           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = Commit]
                           /\ messages' = messages \cup {CommitMsg}
                           /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state>>

CoordinatorDecideAbort == /\ state[coordinator] = Decide
                          /\ \E p \in participants : state[p] = VoteNo
                          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = Abort]
                          /\ messages' = messages \cup {AbortMsg}
                          /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state>>

\* Participants receive Commit or Abort
ParticipantCommit == /\ state[coordinator] = Commit
                     /\ state[participant] = VoteYes
                     /\ messages' = messages \cup {CommitMsg}
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![participant] = Commit]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state>>

ParticipantAbort == /\ state[coordinator] = Abort
                    /\ state[participant] = VoteNo
                    /\ messages' = messages \cup {AbortMsg}
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![participant] = Abort]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state>>

\* Next-state relation
Next == \/ CoordinatorPrepare
      \/ ParticipantVoteYes
      \/ ParticipantVoteNo
      \/ CoordinatorDecideCommit
      \/ CoordinatorDecideAbort
      \/ ParticipantCommit
      \/ ParticipantAbort

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, state, messages>> /\ TypeOK

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC, Integers

VARIABLES forks, states
LEFT(i) == (i - 1) % N
RIGHT(i) == (i + 1) % N

\* Type checking
TypeOK == 
    /\ forks ∈ [0..N-1 -> 0..N-1] \* fork ownership: -1 indicates free
    /\ states ∈ [0..N-1 -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
    /\ \A i ∈ 0..N-1: forks[i] ∈ 0..N-1 \/ forks[i] = -1
    /\ \A i ∈ 0..N-1: states[i] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

\* Initial state
Init == 
    /\ forks = [i \in 0..N-1 -> -1]
    /\ states = [i \in 0..N-1 -> "thinking"]

\* Next-state relation
Next == 
    \E i \in 0..N-1:
        /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = -1
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = -1
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    \/ \E i \in 0..N-1:
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ forks' = forks
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ \E i \in 0..N-1:
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = -1, ![RIGHT(i)] = -1]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i.
   flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number, FALSE otherwise. *)

(* TypeOK ensures that num and flag are functions from 1..N to Nat and Bool respectively. *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ num \in 1..N -> Nat
  /\ flag \in 1..N -> Bool

(* Init sets all tickets to 0 and all flags to FALSE. *)
Init == 
  /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next defines the possible actions of each process i. *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    (* Choosing phase: set flag[i] to TRUE. *)
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ num' = num
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ num' = num

  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    (* Assigning number: set flag[i] to FALSE and num[i] to 1 + max(num[j] : j \in 1..N). *)
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + MAX(num[j] : j \in 1..N)]
    /\ flag[i] = TRUE
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + MAX(num[j] : j \in 1..N)]

  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    (* Entering critical section: process i waits until all other processes with lower numbers have exited. *)
    /\ flag' = flag
    /\ num' = num
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ flag' = flag
    /\ num' = num

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

\* q is a sequence of length K, representing the queue slots
\* head and tail are indices into q, modulo K
\* size is the number of elements in the queue

TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ size = 0

Producer == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ head' = head
     /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
     /\ size' = size + 1
     /\ q' = SubSeq(q, 0, K-1) \* q remains unchanged
  /\ head' = head
     /\ tail' = tail
     /\ size' = size
     /\ q' = q

Consumer == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
     /\ tail' = tail
     /\ size' = size - 1
     /\ q' = SubSeq(q, 0, K-1) \* q remains unchanged
  /\ head' = head
     /\ tail' = tail
     /\ size' = size
     /\ q' = q

Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == 
  /\ TypeOK
  /\ Init
  /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* -- type definitions -- *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
        /\ votedFor \in Nat \cup {None}
        /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* -- initial state -- *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
      /\ votedFor = None
      /\ state = "Follower"

(* -- state transitions -- *)
FollowerToCandidate == /\ state = "Follower"
                    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
                    /\ votedFor' = currentTerm'
                    /\ state' = "Candidate"

CandidateToLeader == /\ state = "Candidate"
                   /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
                   /\ votedFor' = votedFor
                   /\ state' = "Leader"

(* -- next state -- *)
Next == \/ FollowerToCandidate
      \/ CandidateToLeader
      \/ /\ state' = state
         /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
         /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> /\ TypeOK

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == /\ readers \in Nat
        /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReaderEnter == /\ writer_active = FALSE
             /\ readers' = readers + 1
             /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReaderExit == /\ readers > 0
            /\ readers' = readers - 1
            /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriterEnter == /\ writer_active = FALSE
             /\ readers = 0
             /\ writer_active' = TRUE
             /\ readers' = readers

WriterExit == /\ writer_active = TRUE
            /\ writer_active' = FALSE
            /\ readers' = readers

Next == \/ ReaderEnter
      \/ ReaderExit
      \/ WriterEnter
      \/ WriterExit

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> /\ TypeOK

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

(* TypeOK ensures store is a partial function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Init: store is empty *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Next: either a Put or a Get operation *)
Next == 
  \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
    \E Put(k, v) /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ \E k \in Keys :
    \E Get(k) /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen

(* Types *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: 1..N, value: V]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: 1..N, value: V]]
  /\ promises \in [1..N -> [ballot: 1..N, value: V]]
  /\ accepted \in [1..N -> [ballot: 1..N, value: V]]
  /\ chosen \in [1..N -> [ballot: 1..N, value: V]]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> <<>>]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> <<>>]]
  /\ promises = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> <<>>]]
  /\ accepted = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> <<>>]]
  /\ chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> <<>>]]

(* Prepare/Promise phase *)
Prepare(j) == 
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![j].ballot = proposers[j].ballot + 1,
                                   ![j].value = proposers[j].value]
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ promises' = [i \in 1..N |-> 
          [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot + 1, value |-> proposers[j].value]]
  /\ accepted' = accepted
  /\ chosen' = chosen

(* Accept/Accepted phase *)
Accept(j) == 
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..N |-> 
          [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot, value |-> proposers[j].value]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

(* Chosen phase *)
Chosen(j) == 
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepted' = accepted
  /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..N |-> 
          [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot, value |-> proposers[j].value]]

(* Next state *)
Next == 
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Prepare(j)
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Accept(j)
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Chosen(j)

(* Spec *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen>> /\ TypeOK

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_CHUNKS
VARIABLES retransmitCount, sentChunks, lostChunks

TypeOK ==
    /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ sentChunks \in 1..FILE_CHUNKS
    /\ lostChunks \in 1..FILE_CHUNKS

Init ==
    /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ sentChunks \in 1..FILE_CHUNKS
    /\ lostChunks \in 1..FILE_CHUNKS

Next ==
    \/ /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
    \/ /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
    \/ /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks + 1
       /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
    \/ /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks + 1

Spec ==
    /\ Init
    /\ [][Next]_<<retransmitCount, sentChunks, lostChunks>>
    /\ TypeOK
